name: Property Tax/Rent Rebate Program

hard_filters.age_or_disability: Older adults or people with disabilities age 18+

required_documents: Rent certificate or property tax receipts
status_logic: Eligible only if PA resident, housing is owner/renter, age/disability requirement passes, and annual income <= 48,110 under current published brackets.
notes: Do not score above 48,110 as eligible. Do not allow homeless housing status. Supplemental rebates may apply but are not base-match criteria.

name: Homestead/Farmstead Exclusion (Taxpayer Relief Act / Act 1 of 2006)
owner: PA DCED / school districts / county assessment offices
apply_url: County assessment office / local homestead application

hard_filters.deadline: preceding March 1 for tax years beginning July 1 or January 1

status_logic: Eligible only for owner-occupied primary residences; not for renters; local school-district relief availability varies.
notes: This is distinct from PTRR. Do not infer universal availability or cash amount; relief depends on school district/property tax reduction allocations.

name: PACE / PACENET Prescription Assistance
status_logic: Never show as eligible under age 65. Income thresholds exist and must be modeled from official program materials before 100% eligibility is shown.
notes: Keep as 'Possibly eligible — income verification needed' until exact current thresholds are loaded from primary source materials.

name: LIHEAP

hard_filters.income_basis: household income; specific limits vary by household size

required_documents: Proof of income for household members
Heating bill or fuel vendor information
status_logic: Do not show 100% without household-size income table loaded. Outside the published season, show closed/inactive status rather than eligible.
notes: Cash grants help pay heating bills. Crisis component may exist separately.

name: Medicaid for Older People and People with Disabilities

hard_filters.population: older adults and/or people with disabilities
hard_filters.income_resources: must meet Medical Assistance income/resources and other requirements

status_logic: Do not show as eligible unless PA residency and pathway (older adult/disability) are satisfied. Final status requires current MA income/resource rules.
notes: Use as umbrella pathway, not a flat generic result.

name: Medical Assistance for Workers with Disabilities (MAWD)
status_logic: Hard-fail if not working or no disability indication. Do not show for retirees/non-workers unless user states paid employment.
notes: Program literature in official DHS materials indicates additional age details; confirm exact current age limits before surfacing final 100% status.

name: Community HealthChoices (CHC)

pathways: needs Medicaid LTSS / nursing-facility level of care

hard_exclusions: ODP participants receiving services beyond supports coordination
Residents of state-operated nursing facilities including state veterans homes
status_logic: Hard-fail unless age 21+, Medicaid enrolled, and one CHC pathway applies.

name: OPTIONS Program
geography: Pennsylvania statewide via Area Agencies on Aging
apply_url: Area Agency on Aging / OPTIONS intake

hard_filters.functional_need: must have unmet needs impacting daily functioning

status_logic: Hard-fail if under 60 or no functional need. Cost-sharing may apply; do not treat as cash grant.

name: PA MEDI Medicare Counseling
apply_url: Request help with Medicare via PA MEDI

hard_filters.need: Medicare counseling / enrollment or cost-help navigation

status_logic: Should be offered as navigation support, not income-tested aid. Great companion result for Medicare/Extra Help/MSP questions.

name: PA LINK to Aging and Disability Resources
apply_url: Request Aging and Disability Resources through PA LINK
status_logic: Offer broadly as a referral/navigation layer, not a scored financial benefit.

name: Senior Farmers Market Nutrition Program
owner: PA Department of Agriculture / Department of Aging

hard_filters.distribution_window: Checks distributed June 1 to September 30; redemption through November 30

required_documents: Residency as required by local application
status_logic: Do not show 100% without current income guidelines loaded. Seasonal availability should be shown.

name: Pennsylvania Unclaimed Property / Money Match
required_documents: Address or relationship documentation depending on claim type
status_logic: Never score by income/age/disease. Show as a search opportunity, not eligibility probability.
notes: 1 in 10 Pennsylvanians has unclaimed property; average claim is more than $1,000.

name: Medical Assistance Transportation Program (MATP)

hard_filters.need: unmet transportation need for non-emergency medical transport

status_logic: Hard-fail if not on Medical Assistance.

name: Medicare Savings Programs
apply_url: Apply through Pennsylvania Medicaid / state process

hard_filters.income_resources: income/resources usually below program limits; state determines exact qualification

status_logic: Never mark final eligible without Medicare + current state-specific MSP rules. Offer as likely follow-on for PA MEDI / Medicaid users.

name: Extra Help for Medicare Part D
status_logic: Do not show as final eligible without Medicare context and income/resource data. Can be suggested via PA MEDI counseling.

name: State Blind Pension

hard_filters.vision: better eye with corrective lens must not exceed 3/60 or 10/200

status_logic: Hard-fail if age < 21, vision standard not met, property > $7,500, or annual net income including benefit > $4,260.
